summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new authentication system and admin user management features. Backend API testing: 17/18 passed. Frontend UI testing: All features working correctly.

critical.issue: SECURITY VULNERABILITY: Admin endpoints return 200 OK without authentication token. The Depends(lambda: verify_admin_token) pattern in admin_users.py is not working correctly - it doesn't properly invoke the token verification function.
critical.details: The lambda expression `Depends(lambda: verify_admin_token)` returns the function object instead of executing it with the request credentials. Should use `Depends(verify_admin_token)` directly after importing the function properly.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix admin_users.py authentication dependency - change `Depends(lambda: verify_admin_token)` to properly use the verify_admin_token function from server.py
The fix should import and use the function correctly, or refactor the admin auth dependency pattern
critical_code_review_comments: Security Bug: admin_users.py lines 62, 114 - Depends(lambda: verify_admin_token) doesn't work as intended. The lambda returns the function object without calling it, bypassing authentication
MOCKED: Mercado Pago card tokenization requires frontend SDK integration (partially implemented)

success_rate.backend: 94% (17/18 tests passed - 1 failed due to security vulnerability)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users via backend tests with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth system (email/password registration, login, logout, session management) is fully working. Admin user management UI is complete. Main issue is the CRITICAL security bug in admin_users.py where endpoints don't require authentication due to incorrect Depends() usage.

email_registration.details: Creates user, returns session_token, sets httpOnly cookie

get_current_user.details: Returns user data from session token (cookie or Bearer header)

admin_user_list.status: PASS (but SECURITY BUG - no auth required)
admin_user_list.details: Returns paginated users with filter/search support

admin_user_stats.status: PASS (but SECURITY BUG - no auth required)
admin_user_stats.details: Returns subscription stats, auth provider breakdown

admin_grant_access.details: Creates user or updates existing with manual subscription

payment_plans.details: Returns monthly and semestral plans with features

auth_page_ui.details: Login/Register tabs, Google OAuth button, form validation all working

admin_users_ui.details: Stats cards, user table, search/filter, grant access dialog all working

reproduction_steps: 2. Make GET request to https://remy-exam-prep.preview.emergentagent.com/api/admin/users without Authorization header
3. Observe 200 OK response with full user list instead of 401 Unauthorized
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In admin_users.py, the dependency `_: str = Depends(lambda: verify_admin_token)` doesn't work correctly. The lambda `lambda: verify_admin_token` returns the function object when called, not the result of calling verify_admin_token with the request credentials. Since verify_admin_token is initially set to None and later updated via set_admin_verifier(), the lambda returns None which satisfies the dependency without any auth check.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_recommendation: 1. Import verify_admin_token properly or 2. Create a standalone admin auth dependency in admin_users.py that uses the HTTPBearer security scheme directly, similar to how server.py defines verify_admin_token
